rationale: Routine package-lock.json bumps: @protobufjs/codegen 2.0.4 to 2.0.5, @protobufjs/fetch 1.1.0 to 1.1.1, @protobufjs/inquire 1.1.0 to 1.1.2, @protobufjs/utf8 1.1.0 to 1.1.1, protobufjs 7.5.5 to 7.5.6. All are patch versions from a single upstream maintainer (protobufjs). No source code, no test changes. Lockfile-only update that any agent or human would make to keep transitive dependencies current.
